beginner.question: What is a Demultiplexer (DEMUX)?
beginner.answer: Routes one input to one of many outputs by select code.

intermediate.question: DEMUX in memory?
intermediate.answer: Decodes addresses to enable one chip/row.

advanced.question: Crosstalk concern?
advanced.answer: Guard and decode to avoid leakage.

expert.question: Display use?
expert.answer: Scans digits by enabling one at a time.
